title: TEEN COURSE FINAL: Tournament + certificate
description: The final teen exam — 95 WPM on a comprehensive mixed real-world paragraph. Pass earns the Teen Mastery certificate.
text: Seventy-five lessons ago, the keyboard was a puzzle. Today, it's an extension of your thinking. You can write essays in minutes, send messages faster than you can speak, and keep up with any deadline. This final passage is the gate — long, dense, mixed content at 95 WPM. Pass it, and the Teen Mastery certificate is yours. Type with care.

tips.text: Pass at 60+ WPM = Gold cert, 80+ = Platinum

tips.text: Type slowly if you must — accuracy gates cert level

character_tips.anna: 🎓🏆 TEEN FINAL. 75 lessons led here. Type with care — certificate is one paragraph away.
character_tips.maxim: End of teen course. Pass = certified for life. Slow + steady wins.
character_tips.knopych: 🐉👑 FINAL BOSS! ONE LAST FIGHT FOR THE CROWN!
character_tips.klavochka: My hero, final moment! Breathe, type, earn your crown 👑✨
